{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ragnarus sword
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] held a red-bladed [[Ragnarus sword]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Incarnation]] possesses a [[Ragnarus sword]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
